concerns.text: T021 (run_benchmark.py main entry point) is listed BEFORE T024 (seed/version logging persistence in src/utils/logging.py). The entry point requires logging infrastructure to be functional from startup. T024 must precede T021 to satisfy producer-before-consumer ordering.

T011 (Setup logging infrastructure in src/utils/logging.py) and T024 (Implement seed/version logging persistence in src/utils/logging.py) both target the same file. T011 should establish the base logging module, then T024 extends it. This creates a hidden ordering dependency within the same file that violates parallel-safe assumptions if T011 is marked [P] in Phase 2.

T015 [P] (Implement dataset download) is marked parallel-safe but depends on T001 (project structure) and T002 (dependencies). While Phase ordering prevents actual conflict, the [P] tag is misleading since it cannot run truly independently of Phase 1 completion.

T031 (Implement heterogeneous routing layer) depends on T028-T030 (model wrappers) being complete. The [P] tag on T028-T030 is correct, but T031 should not be marked [P] since it consumes the outputs of T028-T030. Currently T031 has no [P] tag which is correct, but the dependency should be explicit in the task description.
